description_long: This object is an egg-shaped item with a smooth, hard shell featuring a marbled pattern of colors. The surface displays swirling blends of white, cream, pinkish-red, brown, and dark gray, with some areas appearing almost translucent and others more opaque. The coloration is irregular, with organic, cloud-like transitions and some subtle veining, giving it a unique, natural appearance. The shell appears glossy and slightly reflective, suggesting a polished finish. The overall form is symmetrical and tapers gently to a rounded point at the top. The object is solid and compact, typical of a natural egg.
description: A marbled, glossy egg with swirling patterns of white, pink, brown, and gray, featuring a smooth, hard shell.
description_view_0: This view highlights the lighter side of the egg, with prominent white and pinkish-red marbling and subtle veining.
description_view_1: This side shows darker marbling with more brown and gray tones, and a distinct orange-brown patch near the top.
description_view_2: This view features a blend of gray and greenish hues with less pronounced marbling and a smoother appearance.
description_view_3: This side is dominated by pale white and pinkish-red marbling, with a soft, cloud-like transition between colors.
attribute_orientation: upright with the pointed end facing up
attribute_contextual_placement: Most likely encountered as part of a food preparation or serving setting, or possibly as a decorative item in a kitchen or dining area.
attribute_decorative_patterns: marbled swirls and veining in white, pink, brown, and gray
